mapper.select: select r.review_id, r.order_id, r.rating, r.content, r.create_time, u.username as reviewer_name, i.title as item_title from review r left join user u on r.reviewer_id = u.user_id left join item i on r.item_id = i.item_id where r.item_id = #{itemId} order by r.create_time desc

select r.review_id, r.order_id, r.rating, r.content, r.create_time, u.username as reviewer_name, i.title as item_title from review r left join user u on r.reviewer_id = u.user_id left join item i on r.item_id = i.item_id where r.target_id = #{targetId} and r.rating >= 1 order by r.create_time desc
select #{itemId} as item_id, coalesce(avg(rating), 0) as average_rating, count(*) as review_count from review where item_id = #{itemId} and rating >= 1

select #{sellerId} as user_id, coalesce(avg(r.rating), 0) as overall_rating, count(distinct r.item_id) as rated_item_count from review r join item i on r.item_id = i.item_id where i.seller_id = #{sellerId} and r.rating >= 1
